description: Détection d'un scan de ports SYN sur un serveur web
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SYN Scan détecté"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000001; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'une attaque DoS par flood UDP
snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"UDP Flood DoS"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 1000, seconds 1; sid:1000002; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de connexion SSH par brute force
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 22 (msg:"SSH Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 60; sid:1000003; rev:1;)

description: Injection SQL dans une requête HTTP GET
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SQL Injection GET"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"union+select"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000004; rev:1;)

description: Scan de ports FTP pour recherche de services ouverts
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 21 (msg:"FTP Port Scan"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 10; sid:1000005; rev:1;)

description: Attaque SYN Flood contre un serveur DNS
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 53 (msg:"SYN Flood DNS"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 500, seconds 1; sid:1000006; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'exploitation de buffer overflow via FTP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 21 (msg:"FTP Buffer Overflow"; content:"USER"; content:"AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA"; sid:1000007; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'un reverse shell via connexion sortante suspecte
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 4444 (msg:"Reverse Shell détecté port 4444"; flags:S; sid:1000008; rev:1;)

description: Scan ICMP ping sweep sur le réseau interne
snort_rule: alert icmp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ICMP Ping Sweep"; itype:8; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 30, seconds 5; sid:1000009; rev:1;)

description: Téléchargement d'un exécutable via HTTP non chiffré
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Téléchargement EXE HTTP"; content:"MZ"; within:2; depth:2; content:".exe"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000010; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de connexion RDP depuis une IP externe suspecte
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 3389 (msg:"RDP Brute Force"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 30; sid:1000011; rev:1;)

description: Détection de trafic Command and Control (C2) via HTTP
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 80 (msg:"C2 Beacon HTTP"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/update"; http_uri; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 60; sid:1000012; rev:1;)

description: Injection de commande OS via paramètre HTTP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"OS Command Injection"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"|3b|"; http_uri; content:"cmd"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000013; rev:1;)

description: Attaque par amplification DNS (DNS Amplification)
snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET 53 (msg:"DNS Amplification Attack"; content:"|00 00 FF 00 01|"; depth:5; offset:4; sid:1000014; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'accès à la page d'administration WordPress
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"WordPress Admin Access"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/wp-admin"; http_uri; sid:1000015; rev:1;)

description: Scan de vulnérabilités avec Nmap détecté
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"Nmap Scan Détecté"; content:"|00 0A 00 00 00 00 00|"; depth:7; sid:1000016; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'exfiltration de données via DNS
snort_rule: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"DNS Data Exfiltration"; content:"TXT"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 10; sid:1000017; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de traversal de répertoire via HTTP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Directory Traversal"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"../../../"; http_uri; sid:1000018; rev:1;)

description: Trafic suspect vers le port Telnet depuis l'extérieur
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 23 (msg:"Telnet Access Suspect"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 30; sid:1000019; rev:1;)

description: Attaque ICMP Smurf (broadcast amplification)
snort_rule: alert icmp any any -> 255.255.255.255 any (msg:"ICMP Smurf Attack"; itype:8; sid:1000020; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'un ver réseau se propageant via SMB
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"SMB Worm Propagation"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42|"; depth:4; sid:1000021; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'exploitation EternalBlue (MS17-010)
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"EternalBlue Exploit MS17-010"; content:"|00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00|"; depth:13; sid:1000022; rev:1;)

description: Requête HTTP avec User-Agent de scanner automatique
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Scanner User-Agent"; content:"nikto"; nocase; http_header; sid:1000023; rev:1;)

description: Détection de connexion VPN non autorisée via PPTP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 1723 (msg:"Connexion PPTP Non Autorisée"; flags:S; sid:1000024; rev:1;)

description: Accès suspect à un fichier de configuration sensible
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Accès fichier config"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:".env"; http_uri; nocase; sid:1000025; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de connexion SMTP avec authentification répétée
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 25 (msg:"SMTP Auth Brute Force"; content:"AUTH LOGIN"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 60; sid:1000026; rev:1;)

description: Trafic IRC suspect depuis le réseau interne (botnet)
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 6667 (msg:"Trafic IRC Botnet"; content:"NICK"; content:"JOIN"; sid:1000027; rev:1;)

description: Injection XSS dans un formulaire HTTP POST
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"XSS Injection"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"<script>"; nocase; http_client_body; sid:1000028; rev:1;)

description: Scan UDP sur plage de ports pour services exposés
snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"UDP Port Scan"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 5; sid:1000029; rev:1;)

description: Détection de trafic Tor sortant depuis réseau interne
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 9001 (msg:"Trafic Tor Détecté"; flags:S; sid:1000030; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'exploitation Apache Struts (CVE-2017-5638)
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Apache Struts RCE"; content:"Content-Type"; content:"%{("; http_header; nocase; sid:1000031; rev:1;)

description: Flood HTTP (slowloris) contre serveur web
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Slowloris DoS"; flags:S; content:"GET"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 200, seconds 10; sid:1000032; rev:1;)

description: Accès à phpMyAdmin depuis une IP externe
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"phpMyAdmin Access"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/phpmyadmin"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000033; rev:1;)

description: Requête DNS vers domaine malveillant connu
snort_rule: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"DNS Malveillant"; content:"malware-c2.ru"; nocase; sid:1000034; rev:1;)

description: Connexion sortante vers adresse IP suspecte Tor Exit Node
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> 185.220.101.0/24 any (msg:"Connexion Tor Exit Node"; flags:S; sid:1000035; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de force brute sur authentification LDAP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 389 (msg:"LDAP Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 30; sid:1000036; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'un DDoS par réflexion NTP
snort_rule: alert udp any 123 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"NTP Reflection DDoS"; content:"|1c|"; depth:1; sid:1000037; rev:1;)

description: Accès non autorisé à un API REST sans token
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 8080 (msg:"API Access Sans Auth"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/api/v1"; http_uri; content:!"Authorization"; http_header; sid:1000038; rev:1;)

description: Exécution de commande PowerShell via HTTP
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"PowerShell via HTTP"; content:"powershell"; nocase; http_client_body; sid:1000039; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'un ransomware chiffrant les fichiers réseau
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"Ransomware SMB Encryption"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42 25|"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 100, seconds 10; sid:1000040; rev:1;)

description: Scan ARP pour cartographie du réseau local
snort_rule: alert arp any any -> any any (msg:"ARP Scan Réseau Local"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 5; sid:1000041; rev:1;)

description: Tentative de connexion MySQL depuis une IP externe
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 3306 (msg:"MySQL Accès Externe"; flags:S; sid:1000042; rev:1;)

description: Trafic de minage de cryptomonnaie (CoinMiner)
snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> any 3333 (msg:"CoinMiner Stratum Protocol"; content:"mining.subscribe"; sid:1000043; rev:1;)

description: Injection LDAP dans un formulaire d'authentification
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"LDAP Injection"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"*)(uid=*"; http_client_body; sid:1000044; rev:1;)

description: Attaque de type Man-in-the-Middle via ARP Spoofing
snort_rule: alert arp any any -> any any (msg:"ARP Spoofing MITM"; content:"|00 01 08 00 06 04 00 02|"; depth:8; sid:1000045; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'un scan XMAS (flags FIN+PSH+URG)
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"XMAS Scan"; flags:FPU; sid:1000046; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'accès Kubernetes Dashboard sans authentification
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 8001 (msg:"Kubernetes Dashboard Non Auth"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/api/v1/namespaces"; http_uri; sid:1000047; rev:1;)

description: Connexion entrante sur port inhabituel depuis l'extérieur
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 31337 (msg:"Port Inhabituel Back Orifice"; flags:S; sid:1000048; rev:1;)

description: Détection d'exfiltration via protocole ICMP tunneling
snort_rule: alert icmp $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ICMP Tunneling Exfiltration"; itype:8; dsize:>100; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000049; rev:1;)

description: Tentative d'exploitation Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228)
snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"Log4Shell CVE-2021-44228"; content:"${jndi:"; nocase; http_any; sid:1000050; rev:1;)
